name: gpt-oss-120b (Medium)
archDisplay: Mixture-of-experts transformer, 128 experts/layer, top-4 active, 36 layers
note: OpenAI's first open-weight model since GPT-2; 117B MoE (5.1B active), Apache 2.0.
tpsNote: Does not fit on a single RTX 4090 (24GB); OpenAI specifies a single 80GB GPU (H100/MI300X) for native MXFP4 inference.

results.notes: AIME 2024, no tools, medium reasoning effort
GPQA Diamond, no tools, medium reasoning effort
Humanity's Last Exam, no tools, medium reasoning effort (Table 3 of the gpt-oss model card)
Codeforces Elo, no tools, medium reasoning effort
Multilingual MMLU average, medium reasoning effort
Tau-Bench Retail domain, medium reasoning effort

Scale AI's official SWE-bench Pro PUBLIC-dataset leaderboard lists 'gpt-oss-120b' at 16.20% (±2.67), rank ~19-30 depending on leaderboard refresh (fetched live and cross-checked twice). This is a genuinely different, much harder benchmark than the SWE-bench Verified score (52.6, medium effort) already tracked under the 'swe-bench' slug for this model -- confirmed distinct via Scale's own methodology docs and via HuggingFace's community-submitted Evaluation Results feature on openai/gpt-oss-120b (PR #177 by HF staffer nielsr, created 2026-02-28, citing the same Scale URL and value verbatim). Caveat: neither Scale's leaderboard UI nor the HF PR states which reasoning-effort tier (low/medium/high) was used for the run, and no separate gpt-oss-120b-high or -low entry appears on the same leaderboard (only one 'gpt-oss-120b' row exists). Attributed here to Medium because OpenAI's own documentation states medium is the API default reasoning effort for gpt-oss models and this is the model's isDefaultConfig:true variant -- but this is an inference, not an explicit confirmation, so flag for reviewer judgment before merging.

verificationNotes: Confirmed real. Same HF/architecture verification as the Low-effort variant (117B/5.1B active, Apache 2.0, 36 layers/128 experts/top-4, 128K context). Fetched arxiv.org/html/2508.10925v1 table directly and confirmed all four medium-effort scores appear verbatim: AIME 80.4, GPQA 73.1, MMLU 88.0, SWE-bench Verified 52.6. No changes made.
